heading: Times and places of sessions
label: 7256 Times and places of sessions
text: The times and places of sessions of the Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims shall be prescribed by the chief judge.
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims” for “Court of Veterans Appeals”.Pub. L. 105–3681991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4056 of this title

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month beginning more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–368section 513 of Pub. L. 105–368section 7251 of this titleNov. 11, 1998
